about.seoTitle: About OMZONE — Wellness Experiences in Puerto Vallarta
about.seoDescription: Discover OMZONE: curated wellness experiences in Puerto Vallarta, Bahía de Banderas and Riviera Nayarit. Our mission, philosophy and the Pacific coast setting that inspires transformation.

hero.title: Where Stillness Becomes a Way of Living
hero.subtitle: Born on the Pacific coast of Mexico, OMZONE is an invitation to pause — to rediscover the quiet wisdom that lives in your body, your breath, and the spaces between.

mission.title: Curating Experiences That Return You to Yourself
mission.body1: OMZONE was created from a simple, radical belief: that the most transformative journeys don't require a destination — they require presence. We curate extraordinary wellness experiences where the only agenda is your own reconnection.
mission.body2: Every session, immersion, retreat, and stay we offer has been designed with the same care you'd give to a ritual — intentional, unhurried, held in spaces where nature does most of the healing. We don't sell schedules. We hold space for what your body and mind have been asking for.
mission.body3: This is not another wellness marketplace. This is a living collection of experiences shaped by practitioners, facilitators, and souls who understand that real wellbeing isn't a luxury — it's a homecoming.
mission.visionTitle: A World Where Wellness Is Sacred Again
mission.visionBody1: We envision a world where taking care of yourself is not an afterthought or a trend, but an act of quiet reverence. Where slowing down is not a privilege, but a practice available to anyone willing to pause.
mission.visionBody2: OMZONE exists to make intentional wellness accessible, thoughtfully curated, and deeply personal — one experience at a time.

location.title: The Pacific Coast as Your Sanctuary
location.body1: There are places on Earth where the land itself seems to breathe. Puerto Vallarta, nestled between the Sierra Madre mountains and the Pacific Ocean, is one of them. Here, the jungle spills down into the sea, the air carries the scent of tropical earth after rain, and the horizon stretches into an endless invitation.
location.body2: Bahía de Banderas — one of the largest natural bays in the world — cradles this coastline with a warmth that is both physical and spiritual. The Riviera Nayarit unfolds to the north, a mosaic of hidden beaches, quiet fishing villages, and lush mountainside trails where the only sound is birdsong and running water.
location.body3: This is not a backdrop we chose. It's the reason OMZONE exists. The tropical climate, the proximity of jungle and ocean, the golden light at dawn — every element conspires to create the conditions for transformation. Some places you visit. This one holds you.

intention.title: Intention
intention.description: Every experience at OMZONE begins with a deliberate choice — not a scroll, not an impulse, but a conscious decision to show up for yourself. We believe wellness without intention is just consumption.

transformation.title: Transformation
transformation.description: We're not interested in performance or aesthetics. We care about the quiet shifts — the breath that finally deepens, the tension that releases, the clarity that arrives when you stop trying to find it.

sanctuary.title: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: Every space we hold is designed to protect your process. Nature surrounds you. Distractions fall away. What remains is a sanctuary — not just a place, but a feeling of being truly safe to let go.

connection.title: Connection
connection.description: To yourself first. Then to the people who share the experience with you. And finally, to the wider world you return to — carrying something quieter, deeper, and more yours than before.

cta.title: Your Next Experience Is Already Waiting
cta.subtitle: Explore our curated collection of sessions, immersions, retreats, and stays in Puerto Vallarta. The only step left is yours.

privacy.seoDescription: Learn how OMZONE collects, uses and protects your personal information in compliance with Mexican data protection law.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what information we collect, why, and how we protect it.
privacy.legalDisclaimer: This is a courtesy translation. The Spanish version is the legally binding document.

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
paragraphs: OMZONE, with operations in Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco, Mexico, is responsible for the collection, use and protection of your personal data in accordance with the Ley Federal de Protección de Datos Personales en Posesión de los Particulares (LFPDPPP) and its regulations.
For any questions or requests regarding your personal data, you may contact us at: privacy@omzone.com

sections.heading: 2. Information We Collect
paragraphs: We collect the following personal data when you use our platform: full name, email address, phone number (optional), and information related to your purchases (order history, tickets, passes).

We do NOT collect or store credit card numbers, CVV codes or full card details. All payment processing is handled securely by Stripe, Inc., our payment processor. We only store the card brand (e.g. Visa, Mastercard) and the last four digits of your card for your reference.
We also collect non-personal technical data such as browser type, IP address, device information and usage patterns through cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Data Collection
paragraphs: Your personal data is used for the following purposes: (a) processing purchases, generating tickets and managing bookings; (b) sending order confirmations, tickets and experience reminders; (c) providing customer support; (d) improving the platform experience; (e) complying with legal obligations.
We will not use your data for purposes other than those stated here without your prior consent.

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Services
paragraphs: We share limited personal data with the following third-party service providers, solely for the purpose of operating the platform:
Stripe, Inc. — Payment processing. Stripe receives your payment information directly through their secure elements. Stripe's privacy policy: https://stripe.com/privacy
Appwrite — Backend infrastructure and data storage, hosted on our own servers. Your data is not shared with Appwrite's cloud services.
Email service providers — For transactional emails (confirmations, reminders). Only your name and email address are shared.
We do not sell, rent or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
paragraphs: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. Transaction records (orders, tickets, payments) are retained for the period required by Mexican fiscal and commercial law.
You may request deletion of your account and personal data at any time by contacting us at privacy@omzone.com. Certain data may be retained as required by law.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights (ARCO Rights)
paragraphs: Under Mexican law (LFPDPPP), you have the right to Access, Rectify, Cancel and Oppose (ARCO) the processing of your personal data. You may also revoke your consent at any time.

To exercise your ARCO rights, please send a request to privacy@omzone.com including your full name, a description of the rights you wish to exercise, and any documentation that supports your request. We will respond within 20 business days as required by law.

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
paragraphs: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our platform. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, though some features may not function properly.

sections.heading: 8. Security Measures
paragraphs: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure or destruction. All data is transmitted using TLS encryption. Payment data is handled by Stripe's PCI DSS Level 1 certified infrastructure.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
paragraphs: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
paragraphs: For any privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at: privacy@omzone.com
OMZONE — Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco, Mexico

terms.seoDescription: Review the terms and conditions for using the OMZONE wellness experience platform.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please review these terms before using the platform or purchasing any experience.
terms.legalDisclaimer: This is a courtesy translation. The Spanish version is the legally binding document.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using the OMZONE platform (the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use the Platform.
These terms apply to all visitors, registered users and purchasers. Additional terms may apply to specific experiences or services.

sections.heading: 2. About the Platform
paragraphs: OMZONE is a platform for discovering, booking and managing premium wellness experiences including sessions, immersions, retreats, stays and private experiences in Puerto Vallarta and the Bahía de Banderas region, Mexico.
Experiences are operated by OMZONE and/or independent facilitators. The Platform facilitates the booking and payment process.

sections.heading: 3. User Accounts
paragraphs: To purchase experiences, you must create an account with a valid email address. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity under your account.
You must provide accurate and complete information. OMZONE reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or provide false information.

sections.heading: 4. Purchases and Payments
paragraphs: All prices are displayed in Mexican Pesos (MXN) unless stated otherwise. Prices include applicable taxes where required.
Payment is processed securely through Stripe. OMZONE does not store your complete payment card information. By completing a purchase, you authorize the charge to your selected payment method.
A purchase is confirmed only after successful payment processing. You will receive an order confirmation and tickets via email.
Prices are subject to change. However, the price at the time of purchase is the price you pay — future price changes do not affect existing orders.

sections.heading: 5. Tickets and Bookings
paragraphs: Each confirmed purchase generates one or more digital tickets. Tickets are personal and non-transferable unless explicitly stated.
You must present a valid ticket (QR code) to access an experience. OMZONE is not responsible for lost or shared tickets.
Passes (multi-use credits) are subject to their specific terms regarding validity period and usage limits.

sections.heading: 6. Cancellations and Refunds
paragraphs: Cancellation and refund terms are detailed in our Refund Policy page. By purchasing, you acknowledge and accept the refund policy applicable at the time of purchase.

sections.heading: 7. User Conduct
paragraphs: You agree to use the Platform lawfully and respectfully. You must not: (a) use the Platform for fraudulent purposes; (b) attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Platform; (c) interfere with the operation of the Platform; (d) harass other users or facilitators.
OMZONE reserves the right to refuse service and cancel bookings for users who violate these terms.

sections.heading: 8. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: All content on the Platform — including text, images, logos, designs and software — is the property of OMZONE or its licensors and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
You may not reproduce, distribute or create derivative works from Platform content without prior written consent.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: OMZONE provides the Platform and experiences on an "as is" basis. While we strive for the highest quality, we do not guarantee that experiences will meet every individual expectation.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, OMZONE shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special or consequential damages arising from the use of the Platform or participation in experiences.
OMZONE is not responsible for events beyond our reasonable control, including natural disasters, health emergencies, government actions or third-party service failures.

sections.heading: 10. Governing Law and Jurisdiction
paragraphs: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Mexican States. Any disputes arising from or related to these terms shall be resolved before the competent courts of Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco, Mexico.

sections.heading: 11. Changes to These Terms
paragraphs: We may modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect upon posting. Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
For material changes, we will make reasonable efforts to notify registered users via email.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
paragraphs: For questions about these terms, contact us at: hello@omzone.com
OMZONE — Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco, Mexico

refund.seoDescription: Review OMZONE's cancellation and refund policy for wellness experiences, tickets and passes.
refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: We want you to feel confident when booking. Here is our cancellation and refund policy.
refund.legalDisclaimer: This is a courtesy translation. The Spanish version is the legally binding document.

sections.heading: 1. General Policy
paragraphs: We understand plans can change. Our refund policy is designed to be fair to both our guests and our facilitators who prepare personalized experiences for you.
All refund requests are processed in Mexican Pesos (MXN) to the original payment method via Stripe.

sections.heading: 2. Cancellation Windows
paragraphs: More than 72 hours before the experience: Full refund (100% of the purchase price).
Between 24 and 72 hours before the experience: Partial refund (50% of the purchase price).
Less than 24 hours before the experience or no-show: No refund.
Cancellation windows are calculated from the scheduled start time of the experience.

sections.heading: 3. How to Request a Refund
paragraphs: To request a cancellation and refund, please contact us at hello@omzone.com with your order number and the reason for cancellation. We will process eligible requests within 5 business days.
Refunds are returned to the original payment method. Depending on your bank or card issuer, it may take an additional 5–10 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.

sections.heading: 4. Passes and Multi-Use Credits
paragraphs: Passes (multi-experience credits) are non-refundable once any usage has been consumed. Unused passes may be refunded in full if requested before the first use and within the pass validity period.
Expired passes are not eligible for refund.

sections.heading: 5. Packages
paragraphs: Package purchases (bundled experiences) are treated as a single purchase. The cancellation window applies to the earliest scheduled experience in the package.
Partial refunds for individual items within a package are not available.

sections.heading: 6. Add-ons
paragraphs: Add-ons purchased with an experience follow the same cancellation policy as the main experience. They cannot be cancelled independently.

sections.heading: 7. Experiences Cancelled by OMZONE
paragraphs: If OMZONE cancels an experience for any reason (weather, facilitator unavailability, minimum attendance not met, etc.), you will receive a full refund or the option to reschedule at no additional cost.
We will notify you as soon as possible and process refunds within 5 business days.

sections.heading: 8. Exceptions
paragraphs: OMZONE reserves the right to make exceptions to this policy on a case-by-case basis at its sole discretion, particularly in cases of documented emergencies or extraordinary circumstances.
Promotional or discounted experiences may have different refund terms, which will be clearly stated at the time of purchase.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
paragraphs: For refund requests or questions about this policy: hello@omzone.com
OMZONE — Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco, Mexico
